def positive_sorted_list_maintained_with_insert_instead_of_bisect_insort():
    rule_id = "sorted_list_maintained_with_insert_instead_of_bisect_insort"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Sorted list maintained by appending then calling .sort(); use bisect.insort() instead."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
